_note: Copy to copilot-mcp.config.json (gitignored) and point COPILOT_MCP_CONFIG at it. copilot.profiles is the normal path (every Copilot tool takes a required profile arg); a top-level copilot.prod/pre_prod pair is also accepted as a fallback for callers that pass no profile, but isn't needed once profiles are set. folderIdByEnv is optional (numeric OrganizationUnitId; defaults to prod 231517 / pre_prod 434039 if omitted). uipath.folderPath (singular, legacy) plus queueUrl/addQueueItemPath/serverUrlByEnv are only needed for build_queue_item. uipath needs bearer, oauth, or both — oauth (client-credentials) is tried first when present, with bearer as the fallback if the OAuth token request fails or oauth is omitted; oauth.tokenUrl is optional and otherwise guessed from orchestratorUrl. overrides is optional (per-prodUid clone remaps). Alternatively set COPILOT_MCP_LOCAL_DIR to a dir holding the legacy split files order-copy-credentials.json + uipath-config.json (+ overrides.json). Config edits are picked up live on the next tool call — no server restart needed.

uipath.bearer: <UiPath Personal Access Token with OR.Jobs read scope> (optional if oauth is set; also used as its runtime fallback)
